leadText: The Small Bouquet (Japanese: ちいさなはなたば Small Bouquet) is an item introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Small Bouquet serves no practical purpose.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A small bouquet that was made with heart and soul for a single Trainer.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO A small bouquet that was made with heart and soul for a single Trainer. It made your buddy think of you!
